title: Task 3: Synthetic-check hook for rotation window
design: Hook a synthetic check that runs every 30s during rotation window; assert zero 5xx. Files: src/lib/vault_rotate.py, tests/integration/test_rotate_synthetic.py.

title: Task 2: Add vault_rotate orchestration module
design: Create src/lib/vault_rotate.py with rotate(name, new_value) that calls vault.rotate_secret + schedules T+5min expiry. Files: src/lib/vault_rotate.py, tests/lib/test_vault_rotate.py.

title: Task 1: Add rotate_secret helper to vault.py
design: Extend src/lib/vault.py with rotate_secret(name, new_value) helper that stages a new versioned alias. Files: src/lib/vault.py, tests/lib/test_vault.py. Edge cases: concurrent calls serialize, vault unreachable raises VaultError, empty value rejected.
notes:
Implemented rotate_secret(name, new_value) in src/lib/vault.py:
- Module-level threading.Lock serializes concurrent calls.
- Empty name or empty new_value -> ValueError.
- VaultError propagates from _stage_alias when vault is unreachable.
- Returns the staged versioned alias string (e.g. foo@v1).

Tests added in tests/lib/test_vault.py (all 6 passing):
- test_rotate_secret_stages_versioned_alias (patches _stage_alias, asserts call+return)
- test_rotate_secret_rejects_empty_value
- test_rotate_secret_rejects_empty_name
- test_rotate_secret_raises_vault_error_when_unreachable
- test_rotate_secret_serializes_concurrent_calls (5 threads, asserts max concurrency == 1)
- existing test_secret_returns_value preserved

Verification: python -m pytest tests/lib/test_vault.py -> 6 passed in 0.15s.

Status: left in_progress for reviewer (work-audit) per protocol; not closing here.
